channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tolley in the road, 28th March
item.description:
There's a trolley in the road which could cause an accident.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hammelton Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Checking if tree is protected, 28th March
item.description:
I want to check if these trees are protected as we would like to remove them due to them blocking our fence panels. They are also restricting the alleyway behind our property meaning that no one can access this area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal frame by tree nr 590, 28th March
item.description:
Metal frame next to tree, nr 590

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westhorne Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no 9, 28th March
item.description:
Pothole in the road about a foot wide

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Caversham Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sharp edged slab on lowered kerb that is so sharp it’s sliced my tyre., 28th March
item.description:
As per the photos you can see that this one particular slab has been replaced, both too high and a very sharp edged slab. For lowered kerbs this sh oh of be a slightly rounded edge as per all others in the borough, or at least it should have been laid deeper so it doesn’t stand out and cause the issue of slicing into my tyre.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 515-519, Upper Elmers End Road, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders rubbish, junction of Kidbrooke Lane and Elmbrook Gdns, 28th March
item.description:
Builders rubbish, junction of Kidbrooke Lane and Elmbrook Gdns.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kidbrooke Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Usual issue, 28th March
item.description:
No bins, so litter all over the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple mattresses, a fridge and other furniture, 28th March
item.description:
It's been here for a couple of weeks and more keeps getting added to it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Varcoe Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and garden wasted dumped outside the back of a property. Been reported before, nothing was done. It is on Clock Tower Mews, dumped at back of a house. There have been rats seen in the garden waste, so is a health & safety issue, 28th March
item.description:
This rubbish has been there some time, dumped by someone late at night, outside the back gate of a house. It's a mixture of fencing panels and garden waste, reported before, nothing done. Now its been left rats/mice have been seen running in there, this is a health & safety issue and environmental health should be dealing with it. Rubbish is never cleared from this cul-de-sac, no weekly cleans are done and rubbish attracts fly tippers!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clock Tower Mews, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Increasing amounts of litter on the pavement, 28th March
item.description:
Noticed growing litter problem along this road leading up to Tesco. More frequent s pavement cleaning please. Kind Regards
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 213, Oakleigh Road North, Brunswick Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken handle inside tennis court, 28th March
item.description:
The handle to exit the tennis courts has come apart. The handle is still there so can be held in place to open the gate but doesn't stay in place.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glenview, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 28th March

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Jeremys Green, Edmonton

item.title: Waste pipe running into river, 28th March
item.description:
At the back of the hotel, where it meets the river There is a very visible white pipe discharging water from The back of the hotel into the river. Just by the railway bridge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36-50, High Street, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
